rules.summary: Unless otherwise stated, this Part applies to:
In this Part, the following definitions shall apply:
A firm’s own funds comprise the sum of its basic own funds and subject to 2.5,  ancillary own funds.

rules.summary: As far as compliance with its SCR is concerned at least the following conditions must be met:
As far as compliance with its MCR is concerned, as a minimum more than 50% of the firm’s eligible own funds must be accounted for by Tier 1 own funds.
